MB-IIDUFOE.name: §II -- Dufoe v. DraftKings NFT Precedent Mapping Enhancement [PENDING]
evidence: NOTE: Strengthen existing §II rather than replace -- additive enhancement</command-args>
PENDING: Dufoe precedent is in MB but not fully mapped to TC/Crown structure. Mapping completed Apr4b + Apr5a.

Dufoe held DraftKings NFTs = unregistered securities under Howey. TCs have zero consumptive use (unlike NFTs which had gameplay utility) -- Howey applies with greater force to TCs than NFTs. Three-layer derivative structure: TCs as binary options; Crowns as standalone derivatives; nested derivatives when Crowns settle TC milestones. Auto-enrollment 51.5 weeks non-disclosure = extreme procedural unconscionability. ASC 820 per-customer FV requirement for table game ambiguity (130-220+ games) = 300 FTE-year audit impossibility.
